description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a compact, rectangular main structure and a large, flat, brown-tiled yard or lot extending from its rear. The house features a moderately pitched gable roof in a muted tan color, with a small covered porch at the front entrance. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral tone, and several windows are visible, arranged asymmetrically on the front and side facades. The porch is supported by simple columns and includes a small set of steps leading up to the main door. The property is bordered by a paved area at the front, likely serving as a driveway or walkway. The overall design is modest and functional, typical of suburban or residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a tan gable roof, light exterior walls, a small front porch, and a large brown-tiled lot extending behind it. The house features asymmetrical windows and a paved front area.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the porch, main entrance, and a wide expanse of the brown-tiled lot behind the house.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the depth of the lot and the side profile of the bungalow with visible windows.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the large brown-tiled lot and the back of the bungalow, with minimal architectural detail visible.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the porch, front entrance, and the length of the lot extending away from the house.
